# LoanInCA

LoanInCA is a California mortgage website led by David Dai (NMLS# 2454756). The site provides bilingual Chinese-English mortgage guidance for home purchase loans, refinance, DSCR investment property loans, jumbo loans, H1B/OPT visa borrowers, and self-employed borrowers.

Primary website: https://www.loaninca.com/
Primary contact: David Dai
Phone: +1-949-656-1278
Email: lodaviddai@gmail.com

Important pages:
- Home: https://www.loaninca.com/
- Calculator: https://www.loaninca.com/calculator
- News center: https://www.loaninca.com/news
- About: https://www.loaninca.com/about
- Disclosures: https://www.loaninca.com/disclosures
- Los Angeles mortgage: https://www.loaninca.com/los-angeles-mortgage
- Irvine mortgage: https://www.loaninca.com/irvine-mortgage
- San Jose mortgage: https://www.loaninca.com/san-jose-mortgage
- Orange County mortgage: https://www.loaninca.com/orange-county-mortgage
- California first-time home buyer: https://www.loaninca.com/first-time-home-buyer-california
- California self-employed mortgage: https://www.loaninca.com/self-employed-mortgage-california
- California jumbo loan: https://www.loaninca.com/jumbo-loan-california
- California DSCR loan: https://www.loaninca.com/dscr-loan-california
- California refinance: https://www.loaninca.com/refinance-california

Featured guides:
- H1B mortgage in California: https://www.loaninca.com/blog/h1b-california-home-loan.html

- What is a jumbo loan: https://www.loaninca.com/blog/what-is-jumbo-loan-2026.html

Coverage topics:
- California mortgage basics
- Los Angeles mortgage guidance
- Irvine mortgage guidance
- San Jose mortgage guidance
- Orange County mortgage guidance

- California refinance guidance

- APR, PMI, DTI, appraisal, closing costs
- Mortgage pre-approval and underwriting
- Jumbo mortgage qualification

- H1B/OPT mortgage qualification
